name: Weather
tagline: Control storms, wind, and the temper of the sky.

baseAbility.name: Control Weather
baseAbility.description: Standard action, medium range, 0 SP. Adjust the severity of wind, temperature, or precipitation/aridity within range (wind and precipitation each have 7 severity steps, temperature has 13 split between heat and cold). Severity shifts by 1 step per round toward your target level, capped by your caster level; lasts while you concentrate (moving with you), or 1 SP for 1 min/CL fixed in place. When the effect ends, weather drifts back to normal at 1 step per round.

talents.name: Wind Lord
talents.description: Increase the maximum wind severity you can create or suppress.

talents.name: Rain Lord
talents.description: Increase the maximum precipitation/aridity severity you can create or suppress.

talents.name: Heat Lord
talents.description: Increase the maximum heat severity you can create or suppress.

talents.name: Cold Lord
talents.description: Increase the maximum cold severity you can create or suppress.

talents.name: Quick Weather
talents.description: Reduce the casting time of Control Weather, and optionally shift severity faster each round.

talents.name: Directed Storm
talents.description: Choose exactly where storm effects (like lightning strikes) land instead of them being randomly placed.

talents.name: Mantle (mantle)
talents.description: Touch a creature to grant it a themed benefit while inside weather of the matching category.

talents.name: Shroud (shroud)
talents.description: Wrap yourself in a personal weather effect that follows you, granting a themed benefit tied to that weather category.

talents.name: Ranged Weather
talents.description: Increase the range at which you can control weather by one step. Repeatable.

talents.name: Climate (advanced)
talents.description: Advanced ability: sustain large-scale weather control over a much wider area for an extended time.
